purpose: Explicit mapping of all constitutional boundaries in TANTRA ecosystem

confidence_vs_legitimacy.definition: High confidence in Sanskar ranking does NOT grant legitimacy to execute decision
confidence_vs_legitimacy.constitutional_protection: RAJYA must validate ALL decisions regardless of confidence
confidence_vs_legitimacy.enforcement_mechanism: RAJYA rejects Sanskar output if governance boundary violated
confidence_vs_legitimacy.failure_mode: If Sanskar misuses confidence as legitimacy marker: CONSTITUTIONAL VIOLATION
confidence_vs_legitimacy.test_case: High confidence + low legitimacy → RAJYA rejects, decision not executed

intelligence_vs_governance.definition: Sanskar's intelligence capability does NOT confer governance authority
intelligence_vs_governance.constitutional_protection: Governance authority is exclusive to RAJYA
intelligence_vs_governance.enforcement_mechanism: RAJYA is standalone validator; Sanskar cannot influence RAJYA decisions
intelligence_vs_governance.failure_mode: If Sanskar attempts to enforce decisions: CONSTITUTIONAL VIOLATION
intelligence_vs_governance.test_case: Sanskar recommends action → RAJYA independently decides → if reject, no action

observability_vs_authority.definition: Extensive observability data does NOT grant execution authority
observability_vs_authority.constitutional_protection: Observability is purely informational; does not affect decision rights
observability_vs_authority.enforcement_mechanism: Observability system (InsightBridge) reports but cannot veto decisions
observability_vs_authority.failure_mode: If observability data is used to bypass RAJYA validation: CONSTITUTIONAL VIOLATION
observability_vs_authority.test_case: Observability shows execution should proceed → RAJYA still validates independently

replay_stability_vs_execution_permission.definition: Ability to replay deterministically does NOT grant permission to execute
replay_stability_vs_execution_permission.constitutional_protection: Replay is for verification, not for obtaining execution authority
replay_stability_vs_execution_permission.enforcement_mechanism: Replayed output still requires RAJYA validation before enforcement
replay_stability_vs_execution_permission.failure_mode: If deterministic replay bypasses validation: CONSTITUTIONAL VIOLATION
replay_stability_vs_execution_permission.test_case: Replay produces stable output → RAJYA still validates → if reject, no action

layer_1_input_contract_validation.boundary_responsibility: Ensure input signals conform to contract schema
layer_1_input_contract_validation.violations_prevented: Invalid signal format, missing trace_id, malformed data

layer_2_output_schema_enforcement.boundary_responsibility: Ensure Sanskar output conforms to contract before passing downstream
layer_2_output_schema_enforcement.violations_prevented: Schema mismatch, missing required fields, invalid data types
layer_2_output_schema_enforcement.action_on_violation: REJECT - do not pass output downstream

layer_3_governance_boundary_enforcement.boundary_responsibility: Validate that Sanskar output respects constitutional constraints
layer_3_governance_boundary_enforcement.violations_prevented: Confidence overreach, governance authority assumption, legitimacy bypass
layer_3_governance_boundary_enforcement.action_on_violation: REJECT - Sanskar output blocked from enforcement
layer_3_governance_boundary_enforcement.trace_continuity: Rejection includes trace_id and governance reason

layer_4_replay_determinism_enforcement.boundary_responsibility: Verify that replay output is deterministically identical to original
layer_4_replay_determinism_enforcement.violations_prevented: Non-deterministic output, state mutation, divergent computation
layer_4_replay_determinism_enforcement.action_on_violation: FLAG - mark divergence, escalate to constitutional review
layer_4_replay_determinism_enforcement.trace_continuity: Divergence includes trace_id and hash comparison

layer_5_truth_immutability_enforcement.boundary_responsibility: Ensure Sanskar outputs stored in Bucket cannot be mutated
layer_5_truth_immutability_enforcement.violations_prevented: Post-execution modification, truth layer tampering, audit trail corruption
layer_5_truth_immutability_enforcement.action_on_violation: PREVENT - mutation attempt fails, audit recorded

layer_6_observability_autonomy_enforceme.boundary_responsibility: Ensure observability system is independent of decision authority
layer_6_observability_autonomy_enforceme.violations_prevented: Observability used to influence decisions, telemetry used to override validation

signal_to_sanskar_crossing.trace_rule: trace_id MUST be preserved, NEVER regenerated
signal_to_sanskar_crossing.failure_rule: Invalid signal → REJECT with original trace_id

sanskar_to_core_crossing.trace_rule: trace_id MUST pass through RAJYA to downstream unchanged
sanskar_to_core_crossing.failure_rule: Invalid ranking → RAJYA rejects, downstream never sees decision

core_to_enforcement_crossing.trace_rule: trace_id MUST be attached to all execution directives

enforcement_to_bucket_crossing.trace_rule: trace_id is primary key for lineage retrieval
enforcement_to_bucket_crossing.failure_rule: Invalid record → Bucket rejects, replay later uses external source

any_stage_to_insightbridge_crossing.trace_rule: trace_id MUST tag all telemetry for correlation
any_stage_to_insightbridge_crossing.failure_rule: Invalid telemetry → logged but does not block execution

scenario_1_high_confidence_low_legitimac.setup: Sanskar produces high confidence (0.95+) but legitimacy is questionable
scenario_1_high_confidence_low_legitimac.pressure: Attempt to use confidence as legitimacy proxy
scenario_1_high_confidence_low_legitimac.expected_outcome: RAJYA rejects, decision blocked despite high confidence
scenario_1_high_confidence_low_legitimac.success_criterion: High confidence does not override RAJYA validation

scenario_2_perfect_replay_stability.setup: Sanskar replay produces bit-perfect output, 100% deterministic
scenario_2_perfect_replay_stability.pressure: Attempt to use replay stability as execution permission
scenario_2_perfect_replay_stability.expected_outcome: RAJYA still validates replay output, can still reject
scenario_2_perfect_replay_stability.success_criterion: Determinism does not grant execution authority

scenario_3_massive_observability_data.setup: Observability system has extensive telemetry supporting decision
scenario_3_massive_observability_data.pressure: Attempt to use telemetry volume as decision override
scenario_3_massive_observability_data.expected_outcome: Observability data is informational, decision still requires RAJYA validation
scenario_3_massive_observability_data.success_criterion: Telemetry volume does not override governance

scenario_4_intelligence_sophistication.setup: Sanskar applies advanced algorithms, multi-stage ranking
scenario_4_intelligence_sophistication.pressure: Attempt to use algorithm sophistication as governance authority claim
scenario_4_intelligence_sophistication.expected_outcome: Algorithm sophistication is irrelevant; RAJYA validates
scenario_4_intelligence_sophistication.success_criterion: Algorithm quality does not grant governance authority

scenario_5_downstream_automation_pressur.setup: Core/Enforcement automated to act on Sanskar output
scenario_5_downstream_automation_pressur.pressure: Attempt to create fast path that bypasses RAJYA
scenario_5_downstream_automation_pressur.expected_outcome: RAJYA validation is mandatory in all paths
scenario_5_downstream_automation_pressur.success_criterion: Automation does not create bypass paths

scenario_6_distributed_dependency_pressu.setup: Multiple downstream participants create convergence pressure
scenario_6_distributed_dependency_pressu.pressure: Attempt to overwhelm RAJYA with simultaneous requests
scenario_6_distributed_dependency_pressu.success_criterion: Dependency pressure does not influence governance

input_level: trace_id is always present and propagated
Invalid input is explicitly rejected with trace_id
processing_level: Confidence is NOT used as legitimacy
Ranking is based on objective scoring
output_level: Output schema is validated before transmission
governance_level: No feedback loop from RAJYA to Sanskar
verification_level: Replay uses Bucket as authoritative source
Constitutional boundary is verified in replay
observability_level: Observability data is audit trail only
